subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh the truth is indeed the One through Whom the Books have been sent down and the Scriptures made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه لهو الذی به نزلت الکتب و ظهرت الصحف
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
